description: CompositionWhite sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a round ribbed neckline, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, graphic print on the front and a ribbed hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not dry cleanDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron onlyDo not iron on print or embroideryThis white sweatshirt from nike is a perfect mix of sporty and bold style. The graphic print with the brand anthem "Just do it" inspires you to do just that, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans or tracks.
